_formatNotes._comment: Reusable enemy bullet patterns. Keys starting with an underscore are documentation only and are ignored by the runtime.
_formatNotes.sound: Optional sound effect name played once when the pattern starts.
_formatNotes.actions: Actions run once in array order.
_formatNotes.fire: Bullet shape. Supported values: aimed, aimedSpread, radial.
_formatNotes.speed: Bullet travel speed in canvas pixels per second.
_formatNotes.kind: Visual bullet type used by the renderer.
_formatNotes.originX: Horizontal spawn offset from the attacker in canvas pixels. Negative values move the spawn point left.
_formatNotes.originY: Optional vertical spawn offset from the attacker in canvas pixels. Positive values move the spawn point down.
_formatNotes.angleOffsets: Offsets from the player-aimed direction in radians. Negative values turn upward and positive values turn downward.
_formatNotes.count: Number of bullets distributed evenly around a full circle.
_formatNotes.retreat.speed: Horizontal retreat speed in canvas pixels per second. Positive values move the enemy right.
_formatNotes.finish: Properties copied onto the attacker after firing. Use this for one-shot patterns or cooldown changes.

barrageRobotExit._comment: Late-wave robot: fire one aimed shot and a 16-way radial burst, then retreat immediately.

actions._comment: Leave the screen to the right after firing.
Prevent this enemy from firing the special pattern twice.

sayoShockwave._comment: Sayo first phase: three sword shockwaves centered on the player's current direction.

actions._comment: Three-way spread. The outer offsets are approximately plus or minus 9.7 degrees.
